name: Godox V1 Flash
description: Offering a powerful 76Ws output along with a distinct design, the Godox V1 Flash is an advanced light source with features that clearly reflect the current state of the industry.

features.Key Features: Compatible with Canon E-TTL / E-TTL II , Sony ADI / P-TTL , Nikon i-TTL | Output: 76Ws | Auto Zoom Control, Zoom Range: 28-105mm | 2.4 GHz Wireless X-System Transmitter | Built-In LED Modeling Lamp | Tilts -7 to 120°, Rotates 330° | Round Flash Head Design | Magnetic Light Modifier Attachment | 1.5 sec Recycle Time, HSS Support | Removable, Rechargeable Li-Ion Battery
features.What’s In The Box: Godox V1 Flash for Nikon | Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery | Battery Charger | USB Charger and Cable | Mini Stand | Protection Bag
